title: SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of services for children with special needs and the school districts serving them, including Individualized Education Program (IEP) support and transition services. 1409 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Suite 110 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 440-4763 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-4763 Angela Keeran [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICES EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - SOUTH-CENTRAL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TAKE ROOTS PARENTING CONNECTIONS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE PUBLIC SAFETY - CARE CONNECTIONS AND EDUCATION REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
